languages.text: {n}В воспаленных глазах сержанта отражается напряженная работа мысли. Похоже, ваш вопрос выходит далеко за рамки его понимания действительности.{/n} "Виноват, Ваше Благородие, в шарады играть не обучен! Не могу знать, о каких силовых полях вы говорите!"

{n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"
languages.original_text: {n}В воспаленных глазах сержанта отражается напряженная работа мысли. Похоже, ваш вопрос выходит далеко за рамки его понимания действительности.{/n} "Виноват, Ваше Благородие, в шарады играть не обучен! Не могу знать, о каких силовых полях вы говорите!"

traits.locale_text: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

{n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

{n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

languages.text: {n}El sargento piensa con un esfuerzo evidente en su mirada febril. Tu pregunta está más allá de su comprensión de la realidad.{/n} «¡Le ruego que me disculpe, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡No se me dan bien las adivinanzas! ¡No tengo ni idea de esos campos de fuerza de los que habla!».
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El sargento piensa con un esfuerzo evidente en su mirada febril. Tu pregunta está más allá de su comprensión de la realidad.{/n} «¡Le ruego que me disculpe, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡No se me dan bien las adivinanzas! ¡No tengo ni idea de esos campos de fuerza de los que habla!».

languages.text: {n}军士思索着，他那狂热的双眼流露出紧张的神色。你的问题显然远远超出了他的认知范畴。{/n}“请您恕罪，大人！我不擅长猜谜！您说的力场，我压根不知道是什么东西！”
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

traits.locale_text: {n}军士思索着，他那狂热的双眼流露出紧张的神色。你的问题显然远远超出了他的认知范畴。{/n}“请您恕罪，大人！我不擅长猜谜！您说的力场，我压根不知道是什么东西！”

languages.text: {n}Le sergent réfléchit, et l'effort consenti transparaît aussitôt dans son regard fiévreux. De toute évidence, votre question dépasse de loin sa compréhension limitée de la réalité.{/n} « Toutes mes excuses, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, mais j'ai jamais été doué pour les devinettes ! Cette histoire de champs de force me dit absolument rien ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sergent réfléchit, et l'effort consenti transparaît aussitôt dans son regard fiévreux. De toute évidence, votre question dépasse de loin sa compréhension limitée de la réalité.{/n} « Toutes mes excuses, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}, mais j'ai jamais été doué pour les devinettes ! Cette histoire de champs de force me dit absolument rien ! »

languages.text: {n}Çavuş düşünüyor, ateşli gözlerinden ne kadar zorlandığı belli oluyor. Sorun, onun gerçeklik anlayışının sınırlarının çok ötesinde kalıyor.{/n} "Affınızı dilerim {mf|lordum|leydim}! Tahmin oyunlarında hiç iyi değilimdir! Hangi güç alanlarından bahsettiğinize dair en ufak bir fikrim bile yok!"
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuş düşünüyor, ateşli gözlerinden ne kadar zorlandığı belli oluyor. Sorun, onun gerçeklik anlayışının sınırlarının çok ötesinde kalıyor.{/n} "Affınızı dilerim {mf|lordum|leydim}! Tahmin oyunlarında hiç iyi değilimdir! Hangi güç alanlarından bahsettiğinize dair en ufak bir fikrim bile yok!"

languages.text: {n}Der Sergeant überlegt angestrengt. Deine Frage übersteigt sein Verständnis der Realität bei Weitem.{/n} "Ich bitte um Verzeihung, "{mf|Mylord|Mylady}! Ratespiele sind nicht meine Stärke! Ich habe keine Ahnung, welche Kraftfelder Ihr meint.
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Sergeant überlegt angestrengt. Deine Frage übersteigt sein Verständnis der Realität bei Weitem.{/n} "Ich bitte um Verzeihung, "{mf|Mylord|Mylady}! Ratespiele sind nicht meine Stärke! Ich habe keine Ahnung, welche Kraftfelder Ihr meint.

languages.text: {n}彼の熱っぽい瞳に現れた疲労。あなたの質問は彼の現実理解の範囲を超えている。{/n} 「失礼いたしました、御{mf|様}！推測ゲームは苦手でございます！御{mf|様}が言われているエネルギーフィールドは、全くの未知です！」
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant thinks, the strain apparent in his feverish eyes. Your question is well beyond the bounds of his understanding of reality.{/n} "Begging your pardon, my {mf|lord|lady}! I'm no good at guessing games! I've no clue what force fields you're talking about!"

traits.locale_text: {n}彼の熱っぽい瞳に現れた疲労。あなたの質問は彼の現実理解の範囲を超えている。{/n} 「失礼いたしました、御{mf|様}！推測ゲームは苦手でございます！御{mf|様}が言われているエネルギーフィールドは、全くの未知です！」
